candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; equals Total Revenue in preview and is the most specific reported revenue line.
Also a valid top-line revenue line; same values as Revenue from contracts with customers and useful as fallback across years.
COGS, not revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list of reported revenue labels; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Direct production cost line and matches Cost of Revenues/COGS numerically, but a more explicit COGS label exists.
Excludes depreciation/amortization and therefore understates full reported cost of sales relative to COGS.
Explicit COGS label; best direct match for cost of sales.
Inventory asset, not income statement COGS.
A component of production costs, not total COGS.
A component of production costs, not total COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported COGS line rather than components.

candidates.why: Valid overhead bucket, but includes depreciation/amortization components that should be excluded when cleaner component rows exist.
Depreciation line; excluded from SG&A components per instructions.
Best candidate-list row for admin overhead because it excludes the separate amortization/depreciation rows.

candidates.row_label: Redundancy Costs and Other Staff Costs
candidates.why: Could be overhead, but preview is empty and appears as special-item-type line rather than core recurring SG&A.
Could be overhead if populated, but not enough indication here versus explicit distribution/admin buckets.
Dedicated R&D line appears below EBIT/supplemental; not clearly part of selected SG&A buckets here.
Explicit SG&A label exists but appears empty in the preview; rules say include it plus closest overhead buckets for coverage.
Amortization line; excluded from SG&A components per instructions.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet item, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the clearly relevant selling overhead row 'Distribution Costs - Other' visible in the income statement. Per rules, I selected outside the candidate list and set manual review. I also included 'Selling, General & Admin' because an explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty, and paired it with the closest populated overhead buckets for coverage. I excluded depreciation/amortization rows and used the '- Other' component rows to avoid D&A. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Distribution Costs - Other

candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense.

Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet item, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line selected. It appears below EBIT/supplemental, so I did not add it to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Total finance cost line, but underlying recurring interest components are available and preferred.

candidates.row_label: Profit for the year attributable to SKAKO A/S shareholders

Balancing/subtotal row, not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is visible, so I used the single reported equity line. To avoid double counting, MIB is left empty.

Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet NCI for book equity denominator.
